issue_title: Variable names prefixed with MSG_ cause error with advanced optimizations
issue_description:
Variables named something with MSG_ seem to cause problems with the module system, even if no modules are used in the code.

$ echo "var MSG_foo='bar'" | closure --compilation_level ADVANCED_OPTIMIZATIONS
stdin:1: ERROR - message not initialized using goog.getMsg
var MSG_foo='bar'
    ^

It works fine with msg_foo, MSG2_foo, etc.

junit.framework.AssertionFailedError: Expected no warnings or errors
Errors:

JSC_MSG_TREE_MALFORMED. Message parse tree malformed. Cannot parse value of message MSG_FOO at input0 line 1 : 38Warnings:
